email:
Subject: Payment processing completely down

Hi,

I'm Marcus Webb, owner of Webb's Electronics. Since 2 AM this morning, none of my customers can complete checkout. I'm getting reports of failed transactions across Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal. I've already lost an estimated $4,000 in sales and it's Black Friday. This is absolutely unacceptable. I need this fixed IMMEDIATELY.

Marcus Webb
webb-electronics.myshopflow.com

expected.summary: Payment processing is completely down since 2 AM on Black Friday, affecting all payment methods. Owner estimates $4,000 in lost sales and demands immediate resolution.

email:
Subject: Wrong amount charged

Hello support,

My name is Priya Sharma and I run a small jewelry store. I was supposed to be on the $79/month plan but my credit card was charged $299 this month with no warning or explanation. I have not upgraded anything. Please refund the difference immediately and explain what happened.

Thanks,
Priya

expected.summary: Customer was charged $299 instead of $79/month with no explanation. Requesting immediate refund of the $220 difference.

email:
Subject: Would be nice to have bulk product import

Hey,

Just wanted to suggest that a CSV bulk import for products would save me a ton of time. Right now I have to add each product manually which takes forever. Not urgent at all, just a thought!

Cheers,
Tom Bradley

expected.summary: Customer requests CSV bulk import functionality for products to avoid manual entry one by one.

email:
Subject: Analytics dashboard not loading

Hi there,

The analytics dashboard has been showing a blank white screen for the past 3 days. I've tried Chrome, Firefox, cleared cache, nothing works. I need to pull my monthly sales report for my accountant by end of week.

Best,
Sarah Chen
sarah@bloomandco.com

expected.summary: Analytics dashboard shows blank white screen for 3 days across multiple browsers. Customer needs monthly sales report for accountant by end of week.

email:
Subject: How do I change my billing email?

Hi,

I just want to update the email address where I receive my invoices. Can you tell me how to do this? I've looked in the settings but can't find it.

Regards,
David Okonkwo

expected.summary: Customer wants to update billing email address and cannot find the option in settings.

email:
Subject: Shipping rates not calculating correctly

To whom it may concern,

For the past week, the flat-rate shipping option I set up is being completely ignored and customers are being charged random amounts. I've had three customers email me personally to complain about overcharges. I've already had to manually refund $67 out of my own pocket. Please fix this urgently.

Anna Kowalski
Anna's Boutique

expected.summary: Flat-rate shipping is being ignored and customers are charged incorrect amounts. Owner has already refunded $67 manually and received complaints from three customers.

email:
Subject: Feedback

Hello,

I have been using ShopFlow for 6 months and overall it works fine. Two things I would like to see: first, the ability to schedule sales in advance (like set a discount to start on Friday automatically), and second, a mobile app for managing orders on the go. Neither is urgent but both would make my life much easier.

Kind regards,
Elena Vasquez

expected.summary: Customer requests two features: scheduled/automated discounts and a mobile app for order management. Both noted as non-urgent quality-of-life improvements.

email:
Subject: Need to cancel subscription

Hi,

I need to cancel my ShopFlow subscription as I'm closing my store. My account is under james.porter@gmail.com. Please confirm cancellation and ensure I'm not charged again next month.

James Porter

expected.summary: Customer wants to cancel subscription due to store closure and requests confirmation of cancellation to avoid future charges.

email:
Subject: ...

So let me get this straight. I pay $200 a month for a platform where the storefront goes down EVERY weekend, support takes 3 days to respond, and when I finally get a response it's a copy-paste that doesn't even address my issue. Incredible. Truly world-class service you've got here. My store was down for 6 hours on Saturday. Six. Hours. During peak shopping time. I'm sure my customers absolutely loved seeing a 502 error instead of my homepage.

expected.summary: Customer reports recurring weekend storefront outages, most recently 6 hours of downtime on Saturday during peak hours. Deeply frustrated with slow and unhelpful support responses.

email:
Subject: Quick question about plans

Hi,

I'm currently on the Starter plan and wondering if the Growth plan includes unlimited staff accounts. I have a business partner who needs access but I don't want to upgrade just to find out it doesn't include what I need.

Thanks,
Michelle Tran

expected.summary: Customer on Starter plan asks whether Growth plan includes unlimited staff accounts before deciding to upgrade.

email:
Subject: URGENT - customers cannot pay - losing money NOW

I don't know who to contact anymore. My Stripe integration stopped working 40 minutes ago. Every single order is failing at checkout. I have a flash sale running RIGHT NOW with 200 people on my site and ZERO conversions. I am losing approximately $500 every 10 minutes. Fix this NOW or I am disputing every charge ShopFlow has ever made to my card.

Raj Patel
Patel Fashion House

expected.summary: Stripe integration failed 40 minutes ago during an active flash sale with 200 concurrent visitors. All checkouts failing, estimated loss of $500 per 10 minutes.

email:
Subject: Possible bug with discount codes

Hi ShopFlow team,

I think there might be a small bug — when customers apply a percentage discount code and then change their cart quantity, the discount seems to recalculate incorrectly. I've been able to reproduce it consistently. Not causing major issues right now since not many customers notice, but wanted to flag it before it gets exploited.

Thanks,
Lucy Hartmann

expected.summary: Discount code recalculates incorrectly when cart quantity is changed after applying a percentage discount. Customer has reproduced it consistently and flags potential for exploitation.

email:
Subject: Invoice request

Hello,

Could you please send me a VAT invoice for my last 3 months of payments? I need them for my quarterly tax filing. My account email is contact@greenleavesstore.eu.

Thank you,
Hans Mueller

expected.summary: Customer requests VAT invoices for the last 3 months for quarterly tax filing purposes.

email:
Subject: Inventory sync broken between POS and online store

Hi,

We run both a physical store and online shop through ShopFlow. Since the update last Tuesday, inventory is no longer syncing between our POS system and online store. We've already oversold 12 items and had to cancel customer orders, which is terrible for our reputation.

This needs to be fixed as a priority.

Best,
Caroline and Steve Marsh
Marsh Home Goods

expected.summary: Inventory sync between POS and online store broke after last Tuesday's update. 12 items oversold, requiring order cancellations and damaging customer relationships.

email:
Subject: Message from contact form

Your image compression is destroying my product photos. I sell handmade ceramics and the color accuracy is everything. After ShopFlow compresses the images they look completely washed out and nothing like the actual product. Customers are buying based on wrong color expectations and I'm getting returns. I want either lossless upload support or manual compression control.

Thank you

expected.summary: Image compression is degrading product photo quality for a ceramics seller, causing color inaccuracy, customer disappointment, and returns. Requesting lossless upload or manual compression control.

email:
Subject: Charged after cancellation

Hi,

I cancelled my ShopFlow account on March 3rd and received a confirmation email. Despite this, I was charged $79 on April 1st. I want a full refund immediately. This is not acceptable.

Natalie Brooks
natalie.brooks@outlook.com

expected.summary: Customer was charged $79 after confirmed account cancellation on March 3rd. Requesting immediate full refund.

email:
Subject: Honest review after 2 years

Hi ShopFlow,

I've been a customer for 2 years and wanted to share some thoughts. The platform has improved a lot. My main remaining frustration is the shipping label printing — it crashes about 20% of the time and I have to refresh and reprint. Also, it would be great to have automatic tracking email updates for customers without needing a third-party app.

Overall happy but these two things are daily annoyances.

Best,
Fiona McGrath

expected.summary: Long-term customer reports shipping label printing crashes ~20% of the time and requests built-in automatic tracking email updates for customers.

email:
Subject: Two issues need attention

Hello,

I'm writing about two separate problems. First, my subscription was charged twice this month — I have two identical $149 charges on my bank statement from ShopFlow on the same date. Second, my product search on the storefront has stopped working — customers type in product names and get no results even for items that are in stock.

Both need to be resolved urgently.

Thanks,
Omar Al-Rashid
Omar's Tech Accessories

expected.summary: Two separate issues: duplicate $149 charge on the same date, and storefront product search returning no results despite items being in stock. Both flagged as urgent.

email:
Subject: Feature idea — waiting list for out of stock items

Hey!

Love the platform. Small idea: it would be awesome if customers could join a waitlist for out-of-stock items and get an automatic email when it's back. I know some third-party apps do this but native support would be great. Zero urgency, just sharing!

— Kenji Nakamura

expected.summary: Customer suggests native waitlist functionality for out-of-stock items with automatic restock email notifications.

email:
Subject: 2FA locked out of account

Hi,

I set up two-factor authentication last week and now I can't log in — I got a new phone and no longer have access to the authenticator app codes. I'm completely locked out of my store and can't process orders or access anything. Please help ASAP.

Daniel Ferreira

expected.summary: Customer is locked out of their store after losing access to 2FA authenticator app when switching phones. Cannot process orders or access any store functions.

email:
Subject: Thanks + small billing question

Hi,

First, your support team was incredibly helpful last week — please pass on my thanks to whoever handled ticket #48821.

Second, a quick question: does my current plan include transaction fees on sales, or is it a flat monthly fee only? I want to make sure I understand my costs as I'm scaling up.

Warm regards,
Izabela Nowak

expected.summary: Customer asks whether their plan includes transaction fees per sale or is flat monthly fee only, while also passing along thanks for previous support.

email:
Subject: Mobile storefront broken on iOS Safari

Hi team,

Multiple customers have contacted me saying they can't check out on iPhone. The checkout button doesn't respond on iOS Safari. Works fine on desktop and Android. This is huge for me since about 60% of my traffic is mobile iOS. Sales are definitely being impacted.

Please treat this as high priority.

Thank you,
Amanda Reyes
amanda@sunsetbotanicals.com

expected.summary: Checkout button unresponsive on iOS Safari, affecting approximately 60% of traffic. Desktop and Android work fine. Multiple customer complaints received.

email:
Subject: Refund

I want a refund for this month. The platform was down for maintenance during my biggest sales weekend without any prior notice. I planned a promotion around that weekend. No warning, no compensation, nothing. At minimum I expect a month's credit.

expected.summary: Anonymous customer demands refund or credit after unannounced maintenance downtime occurred during a planned promotional sales weekend.

email:
Subject: API rate limits way too low for our integration

Hi,

We're a development agency building a custom ERP integration for a client on ShopFlow. The current API rate limit of 2 requests/second is completely inadequate for syncing 10,000 SKUs. We need either higher limits on the Enterprise plan or a dedicated API tier. This is blocking a $50K project.

Best,
Victor Osei
Nexus Digital Agency

expected.summary: Development agency needs higher API rate limits than current 2 req/sec to sync 10,000 SKUs for a client ERP integration. Current limits are blocking a $50K project.

email:
Subject: Automatic tax calculation wrong for EU customers

Hello,

I'm based in Germany and sell across the EU. The automatic VAT calculation is applying the wrong rates for several countries — I've identified at least 4 incorrect rates for Romania, Bulgaria, Croatia, and Hungary. I've been potentially undercharging VAT which could create serious legal and financial liability for me.

This is very urgent.

Regards,
Thomas Becker
Becker Design Studio

expected.summary: Automatic VAT calculation applying incorrect rates for at least 4 EU countries (Romania, Bulgaria, Croatia, Hungary), potentially creating legal and financial liability for undercharged VAT.

email:
Subject: Just checking in

Hey support,

This isn't urgent at all — I just wanted to ask if there are any upcoming features planned for the Analytics module? Specifically interested in cohort analysis or customer lifetime value tracking. Love the platform, just always looking to get more insights.

Cheers,
Brendan Walsh

expected.summary: Customer inquires about upcoming Analytics features, specifically cohort analysis and customer lifetime value tracking.

email:
Subject: Staff account permissions not saving

Hi,

I'm trying to restrict one of my staff members to only see orders, not products or financials. Every time I save the permission settings and log out, they reset to full access. This is a security concern as this employee should not have access to our financial data.

Please fix urgently.

Kim Johansson

expected.summary: Staff account permission restrictions reset to full access after saving and logging out, creating a security risk by exposing financial data to an unauthorized employee.

email:
Subject: Platform feedback

I run 3 stores on ShopFlow. The platform is good but I have been noticing slowdowns in the admin panel, specifically when loading order history for stores with more than 5,000 orders. It takes 15-20 seconds to load. Not a blocker but affects my daily workflow significantly. Also, can you add bulk order export to Excel? That would be really helpful for my accountant.

Regards,
Sophia Andersen

expected.summary: Admin panel takes 15-20 seconds to load order history for stores with 5,000+ orders. Customer also requests bulk order export to Excel for accounting purposes.

email:
Subject: HELP - store hacked I think

I think my store has been compromised. Customers are emailing me saying they're being redirected to a weird website when they try to checkout. I have NOT made any changes to my store. This is happening to real customers RIGHT NOW and could be a phishing attack. I don't know what to do. Please help immediately.

Grace Kim
grace@gracesgifts.com

expected.summary: Store appears to be compromised — customers are being redirected to an unknown website at checkout with no changes made by the owner. Active potential phishing attack affecting real customers.

email:
Subject: Question about migrating from another platform

Hello,

I'm currently on a competitor platform and considering switching to ShopFlow. I have about 2,000 products and 5 years of order history. Can you tell me what migration support you offer and whether there would be any downtime during the switch? Also curious about pricing for a store of my size.

Thank you,
Robert Chiang

expected.summary: Prospective customer with 2,000 products and 5 years of order history inquires about migration support, potential downtime, and pricing.
